title: Crunchy Floral Doner Meat Stir-fry
description: A low-calorie-friendly floral-inspired Korean dish featuring tender doner meat stir-fried with crunchy vegetables and a light sauce for a lazy Sunday meal.

ingredients.name: Vegetable Sticks (carrots, bell peppers, and onions)
Flower Seeds (like sunflower seeds or pumpkin seeds for crunchiness)

instructions: Place doner meat on a baking sheet, drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with salt. Roast for about 20 minutes until cooked through.
While the meat is cooking, slice vegetable sticks into thin strips and mix them with flower seeds in a bowl.
In a small mixing bowl, combine Dijon mustard, soy sauce, garlic paste, rice vinegar, salt, and sugar. Stir to dissolve.
When the meat comes out of the oven, brush it lightly with the mixture.
Add vegetable sticks with flower seeds on another baking sheet. Drizzle with remaining mustard mixture and sprinkle with additional salt for flavoring if needed.
Bake at 375°F (190°C) for about 20 minutes until vegetables are tender and crispy, tossing occasionally to ensure even cooking.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
